gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a newsboy or librarian, updating a bulletin board or reading a daily newspaper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh piece of paper to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
